DataRequest.Name: Windows: Remote PowerShell Session Host Process WinRM / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects remote PowerShell sections by monitoring for wsmprovhost (WinRM host process) as a parent or child process (sign of an active PowerShell remote session). This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_winrm_remote_powershell_session_process.yml
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Remote PowerShell Session Host Process WinRM on $hostName

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process" AND (procName REGEXP "\\wsmprovhost\.exe$" OR parentProcName REGEXP "\\wsmprovhost\.exe$")
